name: pediatric clinics processing 5–15 patient appointments/week tool
description: For pediatric clinics processing 5–15 patient appointments/week, inefficient tracking causes missed follow-ups. We automate appointment history tracking instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For pediatric clinics processing 5–15 patient appointments/week, inefficient tracking causes missed follow-ups. We automate appointment history tracking instead of manual tracking and reporting.

one_liner: For pediatric clinics processing 5–15 patient appointments/week, inefficient tracking causes missed follow-ups. We automate appointment history tracking instead of manual tracking and reporting.
